---
pagetitle: "Contact"
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}


<!-- ============ CONTACT CONTENT ============ -->
<main class="sp-contact">

  <div class="sp-about-header">
    <span class="sp-hero-label">Contact</span>
    <h1 class="sp-about-title">Get in touch</h1>
  </div>

  <div class="sp-contact-body">

    <p class="sp-contact-lead">
      For consulting enquiries, research collaboration, or to discuss 
      a specific question about Nepal's public finance and governance 
      data — reach me directly by email.
    </p>

    <a href="mailto:saroz.pathak@email.com" class="sp-contact-email">
      saroz.pathak@email.com
    </a>

   

  </div>

  <div class="sp-about-rule"><hr></div>

</main>

```
